title: BetterNames
description: Improves item names, advancement names, option names, and any other text in the game. Some are funny, some are useful, and some you'll never even find!
body:
# **BetterNames**
### By CoolStop

BetterNames is a resource pack dedicated to improving the english names of Minecraft. From Advancements to Items, this pack can be helpful, improving, and hilarious!
